# Implementation Report

## Task and scope
- Task:
- Branch:
- Commit:
- Explicitly excluded:

## Feature status
State each capability exactly as one of: Visual mock / Interactive mock /
Companion connected / Locally persisted / End-to-end verified / Production
ready. Include evidence scope and do not promote a mock or unverified path.

| Capability | Exact status | Evidence scope | Regression from prior state? |
|---|---|---|---|
| | | | |

## Vertical-slice map
| User action | Frontend | API | Companion | Durable file/schema | Test |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| | | | | | |

## Files changed
## Contracts changed
List schema, API contract, workspace-format, and ADR changes explicitly, or
state `None`.

## Security and privacy
Cover loopback binding, allowed origins, pairing/session authentication,
keychain-only secrets, path safety, private research data, backup/restore, and
device-local index separation.

## Tests and exact results
Record the exact command, exit result, test count, and relevant warnings for
each check. Separate local, GitHub Actions, and unverified evidence.

## Visual evidence
List screenshots or browser artifacts and identify whether they came from
Playwright, the in-app browser, or another verified tool.

## Traceability rows updated
List every added or changed row in `docs/traceability-matrix.md`.

## Unverified behavior and limitations
Name missing browsers, platforms, credentials, keychains, network services,
restart paths, or other evidence gaps. Never infer a pass from a configured
workflow.
